text:
Get set up
1. Learner notebook: bit.ly/build-real-agents
2. Claude API key: platform.claude.com/settings/keys
3. Phoenix Cloud account: app.phoenix.arize.com/login/sign-up
• Phoenix hostname: app.phoenix.arize.com/s/yourusername
• Phoenix API key: app.phoenix.arize.com/s/yourusername/settings/general
